description: A standalone logger has collected 24 hours of power data (144 readings, 10-minute intervals) for a new building annex, stored in `/home/ga/annex_power_data.csv`. Import this historical data into Emoncms using the `input/bulk.json` API endpoint for node `building_annex` and input key `power`. Configure the `power` input to log to a new PHPFina feed named `annex_power` with a 10s interval. Record the final data point count in the format `feed_name:annex_power,datapoints:NNN` to `/home/ga/annex_import_result.txt`. The admin API write key is located in `/home/ga/emoncms_apikeys.sh`.
